// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace MainApp
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from MainApp.
    /// </summary>
    public static class MainAppServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddMainApp(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddTransient<global::MainApp.MyCommandHandler, global::MainApp.MyCommandHandler>();
            services.AddTransient<global::SharedModule.IHandler<global::MainApp.MyCommand>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var s0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::MainApp.MyCommandHandler>();
                var s1 = new global::SharedModule.LoggingDecorator<global::MainApp.MyCommand>(s0);
                return s1;
            });

            return services;
        }
    }
}
